projects.title: Cinema
projects.description: Full-featured cinema administration platform built with Spring MVC, Hibernate/JPA, and FreeMarker, featuring real-time search, WebSocket-based chat rooms, and complete theater management
highlights: Admin panel for managing halls, films, and sessions with Hibernate ORM
Live AJAX search with real-time session filtering
WebSocket-based chat rooms per film with message persistence
File upload system with UUID-based naming for posters and avatars
Spring MVC architecture without Spring Boot

projects.title: Inception-of-Things (IN PROGRESS)
projects.description: Kubernetes infrastructure automation with K3s/K3d, Vagrant, and GitOps using Argo CD for continuous deployment
highlights: Multi-VM K3s cluster with controller and worker nodes via Vagrant
Ingress-based routing for multiple applications with host-based rules
GitOps workflow with Argo CD for automated application deployment
Continuous integration from GitHub repository to Kubernetes cluster
Scripted infrastructure setup and service orchestration

projects.title: Ft_transcendence
projects.description: Real-time multiplayer Ping-Pong platform with websockets, chat system, user authentication, and match ranking logic
highlights: Real-time websockets for multiplayer games
Implemented authentication and user profiles
Match histories and ranking system

projects.title: Inception
projects.description: Multi-container Docker infrastructure with NGINX, WordPress, and MariaDB, orchestrated via Docker Compose with TLS, volumes, and custom networks
highlights: Custom Dockerfiles for each service without pre-built images
TLS v1.2/v1.3 encryption with self-signed certificates
Docker volumes for persistent WordPress database and files
Secure credential management with Docker secrets and .env files
Automated deployment via Makefile and docker-compose

projects.title: Webserv
projects.description: C++ HTTP Server implemented from scratch with non-blocking I/O, CGI support, and multi-port capability
highlights: Non-blocking I/O and cookie handling
Multi-port support
Strong focus on performance and correctness

projects.title: Ft_containers
projects.description: Recreation of C++ STL containers (vector, stack, map) according to C++98 standard
highlights: Memory management optimization
Deep understanding of data structures
C++98 standard compliance
